fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Continuous lattices and domains
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: Encyclopedia of Mathematics and its Applications; Cambridge University Press

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Baby steps in higher domain theory › what is domain theory?

fr:mainmatter.fr:p: Domain theory is “topology with an attitude”...
Not, to be clear, topology qua the study of topological spaces, but rather: topology qua the search for adequate notions of space.
Adequate for what? There are many viewpoints, and all of them are correct. But today, I speak about computer science.
